title: Stronger and More Aware
subtitle: Activity and awareness increase
description: By week 28, your baby continues to grow stronger, and brain development accelerates. Movements are more defined, and you may clearly notice patterns of activity and rest.
what_to_expect: Fetal movements are strong and clearly noticeable
You may observe regular patterns of activity and rest
care_tips: Maintain a balanced and nutrient-rich diet
Stay hydrated and follow a consistent routine
Engage in light exercise and ensure adequate rest

medical_checkups.note: Monitoring becomes more frequent during the third trimester.

commonly_suggested.name: Routine Prenatal Checkup
commonly_suggested.purpose: Tracks maternal health and fetal growth

medical_checkups.guidance: Your doctor may begin scheduling more frequent visits to closely monitor your health and your baby’s progress.

important_note: Regular movement patterns can help you stay aware of your baby’s well-being.
reassurance: Your baby is becoming stronger and more active with each passing week.
medical_disclaimer: Consult your healthcare provider if you notice reduced or unusual movements.

diabetes.personalized_description: Maintaining stable blood sugar levels is important as your baby’s growth accelerates.
diabetes.medical_focus: Blood sugar levels may be monitored more frequently during this stage.

anemia.personalized_description: Adequate iron levels support increased blood volume and oxygen supply.
care_tips: Pair with vitamin C for better absorption
anemia.medical_focus: Hemoglobin levels may be checked during this stage.
anemia.reassurance: Supporting your nutrition helps maintain your energy and strength.

hypertension.personalized_description: Stable blood pressure is essential as your body adjusts to increased demands.
hypertension.medical_focus: Blood pressure monitoring may become more frequent.
hypertension.reassurance: A calm and steady routine supports your well-being.

thyroid.personalized_description: Balanced thyroid levels support ongoing growth and metabolic stability.
thyroid.medical_focus: Thyroid function may be monitored during ongoing evaluations.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency helps maintain a healthy balance.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: As activity increases, managing multiple conditions requires steady and mindful care.
priority_tips: Avoid sudden dietary or lifestyle changes
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Small, consistent efforts support a healthy progression.
